title: polygala coralliformis
intro: Polygala coralliformis, also known as Coral-root, is a perennial plant species in the Polygalaceae family, native to North America. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Coral-root include its ability to treat respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as its potential to support immune system function and reduce stress levels. In herbal preparations, Coral-root is often made into teas, tinctures, or infusions, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and health benefits.
